---
title: "Miscellaneous"
---

## Academic Activities

- Guest editor of Crystals (2025).
- Session co-chair of the International Conference on System Reliability and Safety Engineering (SRSE 2021-2024).
- Committee member of the International Conference on Machine Vision and Information Technology (CMVIT 2021-2022).
- Reviewer around 20 well-known journals, including Technometrics, IISE Transactions, IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics, IEEE Transactions on Reliability, IEEE Transactions on Instrument and Measurement, Reliability Engineering & System Safety, Measurement, and Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence.

## Honors

- 2023.07 - 2024.12: Research Talent Hub Funding Support from the Innovation and Technology Commission of Hong Kong.
- 2023.10: Best Student Paper Finalist Award, Quality, Statistics and Reliability (QSR) Division, INFORMS Annual Meeting 2023.
- 2017.06: Outstanding Graduates of the University of Science and Technology of China (USTC).
- 2014.06: Outstanding Undergraduates of Hunan University
